messages.content: 中译英：我和他是在操作系统、操作系统实验、操作系统课程设计的课堂教学和实验室教学期间认识的。
I met him during the classroom teaching and laboratory teaching of operating system, operating system experiments, and operating system course design.
润色如下内容：I met him during the classroom teaching and laboratory teaching of operating system, operating system experiments, and operating system course design.
I got to know him during the classroom and laboratory sessions of our operating system course, which included practical experiments and course design.

中译英：基于船舶通信系统的特定攻击检测及防范策略
2022.04-2023.04
【上海大学生创新创业训练计划项目 市级】
•	针对船舶通信系统进行SQL、0day漏洞等网络安全模拟攻击
•	船舶通信系统攻防演练后的测试维护和攻防策略总结

在大学生创新创业项目中，我作为网络安全技术策划，考虑到学校的海洋海事专项特色，结合容易被多数忽视的技术弱点，在项目立项中确定了项目的选题细节方向：海洋船舶应用环境中的系统安全。并且同步跟进提出将技术细节运用到仿真环境上自建服务器模拟红蓝攻防。在仿真船舶AIS的架构选择上，我们使用了开源且鲜有0day漏洞的Vue.js，以此去除架构安全漏洞，同时设置红蓝攻防的渗透和应急防御策略，如SQL注入、弱口令和权限绕过等多攻击策略。我的项目总览和规划能力得到了强有力的锻炼。

Detection and Prevention Strategies of Specific Attacks on Ship Communication Systems
April 2022 - April 2023
[Shanghai University Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program, Municipal Level]

- Conducted network security simulations attacks on ship communication systems, such as SQL injection and 0-day vulnerabilities
- Tested, maintained, and summarized defense strategies after conducting attack-defense exercises on ship communication systems

During the university student innovation and entrepreneurship project, I served as the planner for network security technologies. Taking into consideration the maritime specialty of our school, I focused on the often overlooked technical vulnerabilities and determined the project's topic: system security in the marine ship application environment. Additionally, I proposed using simulated servers in a red-blue attack-defense environment to apply the technical details. For the architecture of the simulated AIS ship, we selected the open-source and rarely targeted Vue.js framework to minimize architecture security vulnerabilities. We also implemented various attack strategies, including SQL injection, weak passwords, and privilege escalation, to test penetration and emergency defense measures. This project greatly enhanced my skills in project overview and planning.

润色如下内容：Detection and Prevention Strategies of Specific Attacks on Ship Communication Systems
April 2022 - April 2023
[Shanghai University Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program, Municipal Level]

- Conducted network security simulations attacks on ship communication systems, such as SQL injection and 0-day vulnerabilities
- Tested, maintained, and summarized defense strategies after conducting attack-defense exercises on ship communication systems

During the university student innovation and entrepreneurship project, I served as the planner for network security technologies. Taking into consideration the maritime specialty of our school, I focused on the often overlooked technical vulnerabilities and determined the project’s topic: system security in the marine ship application environment. Additionally, I proposed using simulated servers in a red-blue attack-defense environment to apply the technical details. For the architecture of the simulated AIS ship, we selected the open-source and rarely targeted Vue.js framework to minimize architecture security vulnerabilities. We also implemented various attack strategies, including SQL injection, weak passwords, and privilege escalation, to test penetration and emergency defense measures. This project greatly enhanced my skills in project overview and planning.

Title: Detection and Prevention Strategies for Targeted Attacks on Ship Communication Systems
April 2022 - April 2023
[Shanghai University Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program, Municipal Level]

- Conducted simulated network security attacks on ship communication systems, such as SQL injection and 0-day vulnerabilities.
- Tested, maintained, and summarized defense strategies after conducting attack-defense exercises on ship communication systems.

During the university student innovation and entrepreneurship project, I took on the role of network security technology planner. Considering the maritime specialty of our institution, I focused on addressing the often overlooked technical weaknesses that exist within ship communication systems. As a result, I selected the project topic: system security in the marine ship application environment. To apply the technical details, I proposed the use of simulated servers in a red-blue attack-defense environment. 

For the architecture of the simulated AIS ship, we deliberately chose the Vue.js framework, an open-source technology that has rarely been targeted by attacks and is known for its inherent security. This choice helped minimize architecture vulnerabilities. To thoroughly test the system's robustness and resilience, we implemented various attack strategies, including SQL injection, weak passwords, and privilege escalation. These measures allowed us to evaluate the effectiveness of penetration and emergency defense measures.

This project provided me with valuable experience in project overview and planning, greatly enhancing my skillset in this area.

润色如下内容：This letter is intended to serve as a postgraduate study recommendation for Mr. Zhihao LUO. I got to know him during the classroom and laboratory sessions of our operating system course, which included practical experiments and course design. Then I served as an instructor for his Shanghai University Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program at the municipal level. In the capacity of his teacher as well as his supervisor, I thus have a good chance to observe his performance and am qualified to provide an appraisal of his potential.

This letter serves as a postgraduate study recommendation for Mr. Zhihao LUO. I had the opportunity to become acquainted with him during our operating system course, where we engaged in both classroom and laboratory sessions that involved practical experiments and course design. Additionally, I had the privilege of serving as an instructor for his Shanghai University Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program at the municipal level. As his teacher and supervisor, I had ample opportunities to closely observe his performance and am thus well-qualified to provide an appraisal of his potential.
润色如下内容：It is worthwhile to note Luo's academic passion .
It is worthy of note that Mr. Luo possesses a great passion for his academic pursuits.
中译英：在课堂教学大纲上忽略和跳过的地方，他可以根据已学习内容串联知识，主动学习实践并提问，对多处理机系统和分布式文件系统有深入了解和学习研究。而在操作系统课程体系教学期间，他还曾多次通过邮件、短信和面对面交流多种形式积极和讲师交流，涵盖从课堂教学内容和实验心得等多方面，并且通过独立钻研和合作方式搭建服务器进行实验研究。

In areas that were overlooked or skipped in the classroom teaching outline, Mr. Luo demonstrated the ability to connect the learned material and actively engage in self-directed learning and practical application. He proactively sought opportunities to ask questions and further his understanding and research in the field of multi-processor systems and distributed file systems. Throughout the operating system course, he actively communicated with the instructors through various channels such as email, text messages, and face-to-face interactions. These exchanges covered a wide range of topics, including classroom lectures, experimentation insights, and independent research. Moreover, he independently conducted server experiments and research, as well as collaborated with others in order to enhance his knowledge.

润色如下内容：In areas that were overlooked or skipped in the classroom teaching outline, Mr. Luo demonstrated the ability to connect the learned material and actively engage in self-directed learning and practical application. He proactively sought opportunities to ask questions and further his understanding and research in the field of multi-processor systems and distributed file systems. Throughout the operating system course, he actively communicated with the instructors through various channels such as email, text messages, and face-to-face interactions. These exchanges covered a wide range of topics, including classroom lectures, experimentation insights, and independent research. Moreover, he independently conducted server experiments and research, as well as collaborated with others in order to enhance his knowledge.

Mr. Luo exhibits a commendable ability to bridge gaps and proactively pursue knowledge in areas that may have been overlooked or omitted from the classroom teaching outline. He displays a keen inclination towards self-directed learning and practical application, actively seeking opportunities to ask questions and delve deeper into his understanding and research of multi-processor systems and distributed file systems. Throughout the operating system course, he maintained active communication with the instructors, utilizing various channels such as email, text messages, and face-to-face interactions. These exchanges encompassed a broad spectrum of subjects, including classroom lectures, insights from experiments, and independent research. Additionally, he demonstrated initiative by conducting server experiments and research independently, while also willingly collaborating with others to further broaden his knowledge base.
中译英：在网络安全领域的才能
Talent in the field of cybersecurity
中译英：对网络安全这项细化计算机科学领域有独到认识，进行过一些黑客操作实验，通过竞赛和实习对网络安全体系化的应用和构建有许多新奇的探索和策略

Distinctive Insights into the Specialized Field of Cybersecurity, Conducted Hacking Operations Experiments, Explored and Implemented Novel Strategies and Approaches for the Systematic Application and Construction of Network Security Through Competitions and Internships.

润色如下内容：Distinctive Insights into the Specialized Field of Cybersecurity, Conducted Hacking Operations Experiments, Explored and Implemented Novel Strategies and Approaches for the Systematic Application and Construction of Network Security Through Competitions and Internships.

With a unique understanding of the specialized field of cybersecurity, Mr. Luo has conducted experiments in hacking operations, enabling him to gain hands-on experience and explore the intricacies of this field. Through participating in competitions and internships, he has made numerous novel and strategic contributions to the systematic application and construction of network security. His innovative approaches and strategies have proven valuable in ensuring the integrity and robustness of network systems.

润色如下内容：Sport has always been a massive part of my life ever since I started watching my father playing basketball at a very young age. As I grew up, I started practicing track and field,fitness and bodybuilding.The reasons why I enjoy about sport are that it needs a lot of dedication and hard work to be successful, as well as its features of demanding and challenging. However,the exposure to bodybuilding in university makes me realize that simple strength training and muscle hypertrophy training have lost their original speed sensitivity and endurance. Meanwhile,I would like to make contributions to the situation that the lack of strength and physical fitness coaches in my hometown. Motivated by both my interests and professional goals, I thus yearn to explore strength and conditioning in depth,aiming to learn how to comprehensively exercise strength, speed, agility, flexibility, and endurance to improve the physical fitness and athletic ability of athletes in various events.

What I learn at university is Sports Rehabilitation, which has laid a foundation for strength and conditioning at the postgraduate level. A variety of courses including Sports Anatomy, Sports Physiology, Sports Biomechanics, Sports Nutrition, Sports sychology, and Sports Rehabilitation helped me open the door to a new world. The more I learn,the more I find that I am more interested in the majors related to strength and physical fitness. Because my undergraduate training program is focused on bodybuilding, I am familiar with the principles and methods of strength training. In order to explore more,I tend to purchase books and online courses on strength and conditioning in my spare time and equip myself with theories.

Out of the academic field, I take an active part in a variety of activities,especially those related to sports and gained several awards.For example, I won the sixth place in Bikini Group B of the National Fitness Championships and World Fitness Championships Trials and third place in the Open Group of the Fitness Bikini and third place in the Finals of the Fitness Bikini All Time Championships of the Chinese College Students Fitness and Fitness Championships and the World Youth Fitness and Fitness Championships Selection Tournament in September of 2022.The thing I was most proud of is that I was selected for the Chinese national team of bodybuilding and fitness due to all my talents and efforts.Actually,being a professional makes me realize the importance of  knowledge, skills and experience for developing athletes across the spectrum of athletic achievement, from participation to high performance.

Sports have always been a significant part of my life since my early years when I watched my father play basketball. As I grew up, I became involved in track and field, fitness, and bodybuilding. The aspects I particularly enjoy about sports are the dedication and hard work required for success, as well as the demanding and challenging nature of the discipline. However, during my time at university, I was exposed to the field of bodybuilding, which made me realize that traditional strength training and muscle hypertrophy programs often neglect speed sensitivity and endurance. Furthermore, I noticed a lack of strength and physical fitness coaches in my hometown, motivating me to make a valuable contribution in this area.
Driven by both personal interests and professional goals, I have a strong aspiration to delve deeply into the realm of strength and conditioning. My aim is to comprehensively enhance the physical fitness and athletic abilities of athletes participating in various events by incorporating exercises targeting strength, speed, agility, flexibility, and endurance.

My undergraduate training in Sports Rehabilitation has provided me with a solid foundation in strength and conditioning at the postgraduate level. Key courses such as Sports Anatomy, Sports Physiology, Sports Biomechanics, Sports Nutrition, Sports Psychology, and Sports Rehabilitation have opened doors to a whole new world of knowledge. The more I learn, the more I realize my greater interest lies in majors related to strength and physical fitness. With a strong grasp of the principles and methods of strength training from my undergraduate program focused on bodybuilding, I continually seek to expand my knowledge by purchasing books and participating in online courses on strength and conditioning during my spare time.

Beyond the academic realm, I actively engage in a variety of activities, particularly those related to sports. I have earned several awards, including sixth place in Bikini Group B at the National Fitness Championships and World Fitness Championships Trials, third place in the Open Group of Fitness Bikini, and third place in the Finals of the Fitness Bikini All-Time Championships of the Chinese College Students Fitness and Fitness Championships and the World Youth Fitness and Fitness Championships Selection Tournament in September 2022. I take great pride in being selected for the Chinese national team of bodybuilding and fitness, an accomplishment that highlights the importance of knowledge, skills, and experience in developing athletes across all levels of athletic achievement, from participation to high performance.

润色如下内容：Throughout university, my internship experience across sports further boosted my passion for strength and conditioning.From April to July of 2022, I conducted post natal physical recovery and strength training with the families of school teachers at the gym of Wuhan Institute of Physical Education,which proved the necessity of strength training in people’s daily life. Later, the four-month internship of being a sports rehabilitation therapist at Hangzhou Chen Jinglun Sports School provided me with more opportunities to experience the field I like. I was responsible for training the weak side muscles of athletes with uneven muscle strength and providing physical therapy for athletes to stretch, massage, and relax after training. I was able to communicate with professional athletes from national elite swimmers and CBA China Men's Basketball Professional League teams,players from Zhejiang Guangxia Youth Team and Zhejiang Juzhou Bank Youth Team, as well as members of the national basketball youth team about how strength and conditioning play roles in their athletic careers. To my delight, they spoke highly of what I did and those experiences inspired me to pursue a career in strength and conditioning.  

As for my career plan, I would like to be a coach at a sports training center or as a fitness coach for a sports team after graduation so that I could apply strength and conditioning knowledge and cutting-edge research to help people in need achieve peak potential.After accumulating sufficient work experience and establish a network of social contacts, I aspire to start a sports school to develop more excellent atheletes ranging from football, basketball and so on,leveraging advanced knowledge to deliver lasting value to society.

During my time in university, my internship experiences further fueled my passion for strength and conditioning. From April to July of 2022, I had the opportunity to conduct postnatal physical recovery and strength training for the families of school teachers at the gym of Wuhan Institute of Physical Education. This experience helped me understand the importance of strength training in people's daily lives. Subsequently, during a four-month internship as a sports rehabilitation therapist at Hangzhou Chen Jinglun Sports School, I gained more hands-on experience in the field I am passionate about. I was responsible for training athletes with uneven muscle strength, focusing on strengthening their weaker side muscles. Additionally, I provided physical therapy sessions involving stretching, massage, and relaxation techniques after training sessions. This internship allowed me to interact with professional athletes, including national elite swimmers, CBA China Men's Basketball Professional League teams, Zhejiang Guangxia Youth Team, Zhejiang Juzhou Bank Youth Team, and members of the national basketball youth team. Conversations with these athletes regarding the role of strength and conditioning in their athletic careers were highly positive and inspiring. These experiences solidified my determination to pursue a career in strength and conditioning.

In terms of my career plan, upon graduation, I aim to work as a coach at a sports training center or as a fitness coach for a sports team. My goal is to apply my knowledge of strength and conditioning, as well as cutting-edge research, to help individuals achieve their peak potential. After accumulating sufficient work experience and building a network of professional contacts, I aspire to establish a sports school. This institution would focus on developing and nurturing excellent athletes in
